languages.text: "Вы". {n}В словах Себериана звенит лед, когда его обвиняющий перст устремляется в вашу сторону. Кожа его лица конвульсивно натягивается, неспособная выразить гримасу ярости.{/n} "Немедленно объяснитесь".
"You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."
languages.original_text: "Вы". {n}В словах Себериана звенит лед, когда его обвиняющий перст устремляется в вашу сторону. Кожа его лица конвульсивно натягивается, неспособная выразить гримасу ярости.{/n} "Немедленно объяснитесь".

traits.locale_text: "You." {n}Ice rings in Seberian's words as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now.

languages.text: "Ihr." {n}Seberian Stimme ist kalt wie Eis und er zeigt anklagend mit seinem Finger auf dich. Die Haut auf seinem Gesicht zuckt krampfartig, als er vergeblich versucht, dich wütend anzusehen.{/n} "Erklärt Euch. Sofort."
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr." {n}Seberian Stimme ist kalt wie Eis und er zeigt anklagend mit seinem Finger auf dich. Die Haut auf seinem Gesicht zuckt krampfartig, als er vergeblich versucht, dich wütend anzusehen.{/n} "Erklärt Euch. Sofort."

languages.text: « Vous. » {n}La voix de Seberian est glaciale, tandis qu'il pointe sur vous un doigt accusateur. La peau de son visage est agitée de tremblements, cherchant à former une grimace de rage, mais en vain.{/n} « Expliquez-vous. Tout de suite. »
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."

traits.locale_text: « Vous. » {n}La voix de Seberian est glaciale, tandis qu'il pointe sur vous un doigt accusateur. La peau de son visage est agitée de tremblements, cherchant à former une grimace de rage, mais en vain.{/n} « Expliquez-vous. Tout de suite. »

languages.text: «Usted». {n}El hielo de la voz de Seberian se resquebraja mientras te señala con un dedo acusador. La piel de su cara se sacude en convulsiones, incapaz de formar una mueca de furia.{/n} «Explíquese. Ya».
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."

traits.locale_text: «Usted». {n}El hielo de la voz de Seberian se resquebraja mientras te señala con un dedo acusador. La piel de su cara se sacude en convulsiones, incapaz de formar una mueca de furia.{/n} «Explíquese. Ya».

languages.text: "Sen." {n}Suçlayan parmağı seni işaret ederken Seberian'ın sesindeki buz kırılıyor. Yüzünün derisi kasılarak seğiriyor, öfke dolu bir yüz ifadesi oluşturamıyor.{/n} "Açıkla. Hemen."
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."

traits.locale_text: "Sen." {n}Suçlayan parmağı seni işaret ederken Seberian'ın sesindeki buz kırılıyor. Yüzünün derisi kasılarak seğiriyor, öfke dolu bir yüz ifadesi oluşturamıyor.{/n} "Açıkla. Hemen.

languages.text: “你。”{n}塞贝里安用手指着你，声音里带着冰裂般的寒意。他脸上的皮肤阵阵抽搐，却连愤怒的表情都拼凑不出来。{/n}“给我个解释。马上。”
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."

traits.locale_text: “你。”{n}塞贝里安用手指着你，声音里带着冰裂般的寒意。他脸上的皮肤阵阵抽搐，却连愤怒的表情都拼凑不出来。{/n}“给我个解释。马上。”

languages.text: 「お前だ」{n}シベリアンの指先があなたを指し示す。彼の声は氷のように冷たくなった。顔の皮膚は痙攣し、怒りの表情を浮かべられない。{/n}「説明しろ。今すぐ。」
languages.original_text: "You." {n}Ice cracks in Seberian's voice as his accusing finger points at you. The skin of his face twitches convulsively, unable to form a grimace of rage.{/n} "Explain yourself. Now."
